name: Cottage Dill Bread (Eb)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat your oven to the temperature specified on the packaging.
2. In a large bowl, combine the water, bread flour, dry milk, sugar, salt, butter, cottage cheese, dried onion, dill seed, and dill weed.
3. Mix until all ingredients are well incorporated.
4. Add the yeast to the mixture and stir until combined.
5. Place the dough on a lightly floured surface and knead for about 10 minutes until smooth.
6. Form the dough into a loaf shape and place it in a greased baking dish.
7. Bake according to your oven's instructions, typically at 375°F (190°C) for about 30-40 minutes or until golden brown.
8. Turn off the heat and let the bread cool before slicing.
